title: Match with fellow monday.com users in LA!

posts.author: bridget.monday (Bridget P.)
posts.cookedHtml:
We invite you to a half-day event, exclusively focused around connection. Join fellow monday.com marketing and operations enthusiasts on December 11th for a day of learning, and most importantly speed networking. Like-minded customers will be intentionally paired together to dive deeper into their monday.com use cases. Register here - space is limited!
